tweets.text:
BuiltWith has ONE employee and brings in $14M+ revenue every year.

It was started ~20yrs ago by Gary Brewers in Sydney to tell you the technology stack behind every website.

Now that's what I call a lean, profitable, bootstrapped business! https://t.co/kcVY4BgqUg
